title: open-webui/open-webui
friendlyTitle: A self-hosted chat interface for AI models
summary: Open WebUI is a popular self-hosted AI interface that supports local and hosted model backends including Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
friendlySummary: Open WebUI lets you run your own AI chat interface with local or hosted models.
whyItMatters: It gives individuals and teams a controllable chat interface for experimenting with models, sharing prompts and running local-first AI workflows without depending entirely on a vendor UI.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is helpful if you want more control over your AI tools, models and data.
